mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, status, created_date, last_modified_date FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, email, password, status, created_date, last_modified_date FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('users_seq')
INSERT INTO users (id, username, email, password, status, created_date, last_modified_date) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{password}, #{status}, #{createdDate}, #{lastModifiedDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, status = #{status}, last_modified_date = #{lastModifiedDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password, status, created_date, last_modified_date FROM users ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, username, email, password, status, created_date, last_modified_date FROM users ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE id IN
#{uid}
